## Pre-flight Checklist
- [ ] `terraform plan` reviewed for all target environments
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, credentials, IPs, or account IDs
- [ ] All new resources tagged: `Environment`, `Owner`, `ManagedBy`, `Project`
- [ ] Tested in test environment before requesting stage promotion
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
